ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
question = nil
answer = nil
tempAnswer = nil
function onLoad(en_state)
    local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
    if state ~= nil then
        if state.question ~= nil then
            question = state.question
        else
            question = ''
        end
        if state.answer ~= nil then
            answer = state.answer
        else
            answer = ''
        end
    end

    makeOpenButton()
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        question = question,
        answer = answer,
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function makeOpenButton()
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.105, z=0}, scale={0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, 
    width=700, height=180, label="봉투 열기", tooltip="봉투를 연 사람만 내용 열람이 가능합니다.",
    click_function='openEnvelope', function_owner=self,})
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.105, z=0.3}, scale={0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, color="Red",
    width=700, height=180, label="전체 공개", tooltip="봉투의 내용을 전체 공개합니다.",
    click_function='showToAll', function_owner=self,})
end


function openEnvelope(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    self.removeButton(0)
    self.removeButton(1)
    self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'visibility', 'Black|'..player_color)
    self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'active', 'true')
    self.UI.setAttribute('background', 'active', 'true')
    self.UI.setValue('questionText', question)
    self.UI.setAttribute('ifAnswer', 'text', answer)
    self.UI.setAttribute('ifAnswer', 'readOnly', 'false')
end

function closeEnvelope(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'active', 'false')
    self.UI.setAttribute('background', 'active', 'false')
    Wait.frames(function ()
        answer = tempAnswer
        makeOpenButton()
    end, 20)
end

function showToAll(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    self.removeButton(0)
    self.removeButton(1)
    self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'visibility', '')
    self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'active', 'true')
    self.UI.setAttribute('background', 'active', 'true')
    self.UI.setValue('questionText', question)
    self.UI.setAttribute('ifAnswer', 'text', answer)
    self.UI.setAttribute('ifAnswer', 'readOnly', 'true')
end

function setQuestion(player, value, id)
    player.showMemoDialog("질문글 설정",
    function (text, player_color)
        question = text
        self.UI.setValue('questionText', question)
    end)
end

function onEndEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, "text", value)
    tempAnswer = value
end

<Image id="background" active="false" position="0 0 -10.1" rotation="0 0 180" width="1333" height="2000" scale="0.1 0.1 0.1" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17205357775264553517/93F25B99F14E4C68984B5EFCB99A5C8C26DA225B/"/>
<Panel id="mainPanel" active="false" position="0 0 -10.2" rotation="0 0 180" width="1333" height="2000" scale="0.1 0.1 0.1">
<Button rectAlignment="UpperRight" offsetXY="-100 -10" width="380" height="80" color="#000000" textColor="#FFFFFF" fontSize="55"
onClick="setQuestion" visibility="Black">질문글 설정</Button>
<Text offsetXY="100 -30" fontSize="40" alignment="UpperLeft" rectAlignment="MiddleCenter" fontStyle="Bold" color="#0000FF">[질문]</Text>
<Panel offsetXY="0 -100" width="1133" height="550" rectAlignment="UpperCenter" color="#FFFFFF44">
<Text id="questionText" width="95%" height="95%" fontSize="40" alignment="UpperLeft" rectAlignment="MiddleCenter"/>
</Panel>
<Text offsetXY="100 -705" fontSize="40" alignment="UpperLeft" rectAlignment="MiddleCenter" fontStyle="Bold" color="#0000FF">[답변]</Text>
<InputField id="ifAnswer" width="1133" height="1050" offsetXY="0 -300" fontSize="40" onEndEdit="onEndEdit" lineType="MultiLineNewLine"/>
<Button rectAlignment="LowerCenter" offsetXY="0 50" width="310" height="90" color="#44FF44" textColor="#000000" fontSize="55"
onClick="closeEnvelope">봉투 닫기</Button>
<Text rectAlignment="LowerRight" width="500" height="80" offsetXY="-10 50" fontSize="30" fontStyle="Bold" color="#FF0000">※봉투를 닫아야 내용이 저장됩니다.</Text>
</Panel>
